findings.description: David Miller's signature block image duplicates text that also appears as HTML text, disrupting reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Sincerely,' followed by signature, 'David Miller, PE', and 'State Mining Engineer' once. HTML shows these as typed text AND as an embedded signature-block image containing the same words, so a reader encounters them twice.

findings.description: Brian Wrenn's signature block image duplicates surrounding text, creating fragmented and repeated content in reading flow.
findings.evidence: HTML renders the full paragraph about serving the Department of Environmental Quality, then shows text fragments 't and General Counsel, Department of Environ' and 'aleigh, NC 27699-1601.' extracted from the signature image, followed by the image itself and then 'Brian Wrenn, Director' as text again. PDF has this content only once.

findings.description: Brenda Harris's signature block image duplicates surrounding text, creating fragmented and repeated content in reading flow.
findings.evidence: HTML shows text fragments like 'North Carolina Dep', 'd on 12-15-2020', 'n 12-15-2020' alongside the signature image, duplicating content already rendered as proper HTML text. PDF has this content only once.
